hooks.command: sh -c 'for root in "${RUNWEAVE_TOOLKIT_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "__PLUGIN_DIR__" . "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/runweave/toolkit/latest" "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/runweave/toolkit"/* "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; do if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -f "$root/hooks/runweave-hook-dispatch.cjs" ]; then exec node "$root/hooks/runweave-hook-dispatch.cjs"; fi; done; exit 0'
